ActionItems: Confirm new diamond-rental rate with Detroit Metro Parks before the spring season.
Recruit four additional dues-paying members to cover the higher rent scenario.
Schedule one extra bake sale in the fall to rebuild the reserve cushion.
Review insurance quote from Guardian Insurance Group at the next finance meeting.
BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Monthly break-even review for the Westside Wolverines / Greater Hope building-fund books, prepared ahead of the field-rental rate change.

CurrentState.Note: Reserve target is three months of operating expenses; current cushion is roughly two months.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: At 30 members and $55 dues the league clears about $415 a month; a rent increase to $850 wipes out the surplus unless dues membership grows.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: A $100 rent increase reduces monthly net income to $315 at current membership.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent rises from $650 to $750

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: A $200 rent increase reduces monthly net income to $215 at current membership.
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Rent rises from $650 to $850
